name: Chinese Vegetables and Tofu
recipeInstructions:
Note: This recipe is endlessly adaptable. There are a few fixed ingredients and some that may vary with seasonal changes and different tastes. Where amounts are given, they are for 6 servings.
1. Sauté garlic, ginger, and salt in a large pan over medium heat until fragrant.
2. Add celery and onion to the pan and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Cook longer-cooking vegetables (such as tofu, green pepper, carrots, mushrooms) one at a time, sautéing each for a few minutes before adding the next.
4. Once all the vegetables are in the pan, add tofu. Place tofu on top of the mixture and allow it to sauté for 5-6 minutes.
5. Sprinkle soy sauce generously over the tofu and continue cooking for another minute or two.
6. Add cabbage (and any other remaining vegetables) to the pan. Cover the pan and steam until all vegetables are heated through, about 10 minutes.
7. If desired, add bean sprouts to the pan and stir briefly.
8. Season with sesame seeds before serving immediately over hot brown rice.
